summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Demand Planning Dashboard - all core functionality working correctly. Backend APIs returning proper data structure, frontend UI rendering charts and navigation working as expected.

design_issues.issue: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1 during initial render
design_issues.impact: Charts display correctly but show console warnings
design_issues.note: Charts render properly after initial load, warnings appear to be timing-related

passed_tests: All 11 backend API endpoints returning correct status codes and data structure
Home page loads with 52-week aggregated chart (13 historical + 39 forecast)
Forecast alerts display with high/medium priority badges (10 alerts found)
Alert cards are clickable and navigate to SKU detail page
Search bar functionality works and navigates to detail page
SKU buttons (10 found) navigate to detail page correctly
SKU detail page shows 52-week forecast chart with proper data
Demand Drivers panel toggles with smooth animation
Average Unit Price chart displays in Demand Drivers panel
Customer In-Stock Rate chart displays in Demand Drivers panel
Error handling for invalid SKU returns proper 404 status
